name: Guzman Y Gomez Limited
analysis: GYG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$19.8200, stop A$17.9190, target A$21.9700 (1.13:1) — then trail it.
